# Implementation Plan: Responsive UI, Đổi Tên Sản Phẩm & Lịch Sử Toàn Bộ

**Branch**: `002-responsive-rename-history` | **Date**: 2026-04-16 | **Spec**: [spec.md](spec.md)
**Input**: Feature specification from `/specs/002-responsive-rename-history/spec.md`

**Note**: This plan was generated by the `/speckit.plan` command.

## Summary

Migrate the `frontend/` directory from vanilla HTML/JS/CSS to a React + Vite + ShadCN UI stack to achieve a beautiful, responsive, mobile-first interface. Add two backend capabilities (product rename and global history API) to the existing GAS TypeScript backend. Apply Tailwind CSS CDN to `src/html/` for responsive consistency in the GAS-served fallback frontend.

## Technical Context

**Language/Version**: TypeScript 5.x (strict mode) — backend (GAS) + frontend (React)  
**Primary Dependencies**: React 19, Vite 6, ShadCN UI, Tailwind CSS 4, Radix UI (via ShadCN)  
**Storage**: Google Sheets (via GAS SpreadsheetApp) — no schema change  
**Testing**: Manual responsive testing at 3 viewports (Constitution §VIII)  
**Target Platform**: GitHub Pages (React SPA) + Google Apps Script V8 (backend)  
**Project Type**: Web application (SPA frontend + GAS REST backend)  
**Performance Goals**: History page filters in <3 seconds for <5000 records  
**Constraints**: GAS 6-min execution limit, GAS synchronous runtime (no async/await in backend), GAS HTML Service limitations (no React in `src/html/`)  
**Scale/Scope**: ~5000 history records, ~50 products, 2 users

## Constitution Check

*GATE: Must pass before Phase 0 research. Re-check after Phase 1 design.*

| # | Principle | Status | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| I | TypeScript-First (NON-NEGOTIABLE) | ✅ PASS | Backend: TypeScript in `src/`. Frontend: TypeScript in `frontend/src/`. |
| II | Single Entry Point | ✅ PASS | New GAS functions (`renameProduct`, `getAllAdjustmentHistory`) exported via `src/index.ts`. |
| III | Bundled Deployment (NON-NEGOTIABLE) | ✅ PASS | Backend: same `tsc→webpack→Code.js→clasp push` pipeline. Frontend: separate `vite build→GitHub Pages`. |
| IV | GAS Runtime Compliance | ✅ PASS | No async/await in backend. React runs only in browser frontend (GitHub Pages), not in GAS. |
| V | Observability | ✅ PASS | `renameProduct` and `getAllAdjustmentHistory` will log start/completion/errors via `console.log`/`console.error`. |
| VI | Credential & Secret Safety | ✅ PASS | No new secrets. API_URL is injected via `VITE_API_URL` env var at build time (GitHub Actions uses repository variable, local dev uses `frontend/.env` which is gitignored). |
| VII | Simplicity (YAGNI) | ✅ PASS | ShadCN components used as-is. No custom abstractions. Client-side filtering (no server-side pagination for now). |
| VIII | Responsive UI (Mobile-First) | ✅ PASS | ShadCN + Tailwind CSS is inherently mobile-first. Custom breakpoints per §VIII. |

**Pre-design gate**: ✅ All principles pass.

## Project Structure

### Documentation (this feature)

```text
specs/002-responsive-rename-history/
├── plan.md              # This file
├── research.md          # Phase 0 output
├── data-model.md        # Phase 1 output
├── quickstart.md        # Phase 1 output
├── contracts/           # Phase 1 output
│   └── gas-client-server.md
└── tasks.md             # Phase 2 output (via /speckit.tasks)
```

### Source Code (repository root)

```text
src/                          # GAS Backend (TypeScript → Webpack → Code.js)
├── index.ts                  # Entry point — exports doGet, doPost + all GAS-callable functions
├── auth.ts                   # Login/session management
├── products.ts               # Product & Variant CRUD + NEW: renameProduct()
├── inventory.ts              # Stock adjustment + history + NEW: getAllAdjustmentHistory()
├── dashboard.ts              # Dashboard aggregation
├── sheets.ts                 # Google Sheets data-access helpers
└── html/                     # GAS-served HTML fallback (Tailwind CSS CDN)
    ├── index.html
    ├── css.html              # Updated with Tailwind CDN + responsive classes
    └── js.html

frontend/                     # React SPA (Vite + ShadCN UI) → GitHub Pages
├── package.json              # Separate from root package.json
├── vite.config.ts
├── tsconfig.json
├── tailwind.config.ts        # Custom breakpoints per Constitution §VIII
├── index.html                # Vite entry HTML
├── src/
│   ├── main.tsx              # React entry
│   ├── App.tsx               # Root component with routing
│   ├── lib/
│   │   ├── api.ts            # fetch wrapper for GAS doPost API
│   │   └── utils.ts          # ShadCN cn() utility
│   ├── hooks/
│   │   └── use-auth.ts       # Auth state hook
│   ├── components/
│   │   ├── ui/               # ShadCN UI components (auto-generated via CLI)
│   │   ├── navbar.tsx         # Responsive navbar (Sheet drawer on mobile)
│   │   ├── login-form.tsx
│   │   ├── product-table.tsx  # Product list: card layout on mobile/tablet, table on desktop
│   │   ├── rename-dialog.tsx  # Rename product modal
│   │   ├── adjust-dialog.tsx  # Stock adjustment modal (toggle buttons: Nhập kho/Xuất kho)
│   │   ├── variant-dialog.tsx # Add variant modal
│   │   └── history-table.tsx  # Global history with filters
│   └── pages/
│       ├── login.tsx
│       ├── products.tsx
│       ├── history.tsx        # NEW: Global history page
│       └── dashboard.tsx
└── components.json            # ShadCN configuration
```

**Structure Decision**: Two separate build pipelines — GAS backend (`src/` → Webpack → Code.js) and React frontend (`frontend/` → Vite → `dist/`). They communicate via REST (fetch → doPost). This is the existing architecture, now formalized with React replacing vanilla JS.

## Complexity Tracking

No constitution violations. No complexity justifications needed.
